WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (TABLE_INDENT_FALLBACK strategy):
  Uniform drift of 5.4pt across all 1 columns.
  Root cause unclear (cell padding and table indent do not match drift).
  Fix: reduce Table.LeftIndent by 5.4pt (108 twips).
  This shifts the entire table left as a unit — do NOT apply per word or per phrase.
  Verify: Table.LeftIndent in source .docx = 0pt. New value should be -5.4pt.

correctionTargets.description: [CELL_PADDING] Reduce LeftPadding on ALL cells in table from 5.4pt → 0pt to cancel +5.4pt drift. Apply once to all rows/cells — NOT per word.
[CELL_PADDING] Reduce LeftPadding on ALL cells in table from 5.4pt → 0pt to cancel +5.4pt drift. Apply once to all rows/cells — NOT per word.
[COLUMN_WIDTH] Reduce col[0] width by -15.02pt to shift col[1] left. Current width must be read from the Word document at runtime.
